title: Sales & Marketing Manager | Oil & Gas / Utilities Specialist
description:
• Up to S$5,000 Basic + S$800 Transport Allowance + AWS + Performance Bonus.

  • Ubi Techpark (10 Ubi Crescent).

  • Monday – Friday | 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • Marine, Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Utilities, and Power Plants.

  • Must possess a Valid Class 3 License and Own Vehicle.

Industry Overview

Join an established technical solutions provider as a Sales & Marketing Manager. This role is designed for a high-caliber professional with a strong technical foundation in Electrical or Electronics Engineering. You will leverage your existing network within the Oil & Gas and Power sectors to drive strategic growth, managing complex technical clarifications and working alongside design engineers to deliver specified products to EPC contractors and end-users.

Responsibilities:

  • Strategic Growth: Develop and implement comprehensive sales and marketing plans to expand market share and achieve revenue targets within assigned territories.

  • Technical Specification: Work closely with customers and design engineers to specify products that meet exact project requirements.

  • Technical Clarification: Lead technical discussions and clarifications based on customer specifications to ensure solution feasibility.

  • Business Development: Actively explore new business opportunities and maintain long-term relationships with key decision-makers in the O&G and Utilities sectors.

  • EPC Coordination: Liaise with EPC contractors to secure project inclusions and manage high-value tenders.

  • Market Intelligence: Monitor industry trends and competitor activity to refine marketing strategies.

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering.

  • Minimum 5 years of sales experience with a strong network in Marine, Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, or Power Plants.

  • Must have a valid Class 3 driving license and own a car (Transport allowance of $800 provided).

  • Exceptional presentation, interpersonal, and communication skills to influence stakeholders at all levels.

Others Information:

  • Comprehensive Package: Benefit from a high transport allowance and a structured bonus system including guaranteed AWS.


Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Details of your existing network/contacts within the O&G or Power sectors.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
